overview_attention_description: Prioritized items that block human review or evidence trust.
overview_recent_changes_description: These drafts need human confirmation before entering the system.
map_description: Start from modules, then expand into promises and evidence.
studio_context_empty_body: The first layer is the architecture map. Choose a module to unfold its promises.
studio_project_add_description: Add a local project by path. The daemon will only load it when the directory contains tests/harness.yaml.
studio_search_description: Jump to a module or promise in the active Harness project.
studio_snapshot_fallback_body: This view may miss newly added modules or promises. Start or reconnect the local daemon for live project data.
studio_connect_body_disconnected: The local daemon is not running. Start it with `pnpm dev`, then pair to load this project.
studio_connect_body_pairing: Studio is not paired with the local daemon yet. Pair once to load this project's modules and promises.
studio_run_requires_daemon: Pair with the local daemon before running tests.
studio_authoring_requires_daemon: Pair with the local daemon before editing canonical Harness files.
studio_authoring_dialog_description: Changes are written by the local daemon and accepted only after Harness validation passes.
studio_prompt_placeholder: Ask the agent to work inside this selected module or promise.
map_selected_empty: Select a graph node to inspect context.
map_selected_help: The graph answers “what is related to this”; full review content lives in detail views and the Promise Inbox.
modules_description: Modules are reviewable architecture boundaries and the first layer of project understanding.
module_detail_promises_description: Entering through a module is more reviewable than opening YAML directly.
promises_description: A Promise is the human review unit of the Harness.
promise_detail_relationship_description: This will become a local React Flow subgraph later.
promise_detail_review_description: Every state is shown as text, not color alone.
promise_detail_actions_description: Later these actions will write canonical YAML through the daemon.
review_description: Reviewers enter from an inbox instead of raw YAML.
studio_review_inbox_empty: No promises in this inbox filter.
review_current_description: This is the UI shape for now; writes will be handled by the daemon later.
review_notes_placeholder: Add a note for the author (optional)...
generate_step_context_description: Describe the capability and choose related modules.
generate_step_draft_description: Become a reviewable object before entering canonical Promise files.
generate_step_decision_description: Generated content must not overwrite canonical state directly.
generate_context_default: I want to see relationships between modules, promises, and evidence, and quickly review generated promises.
generate_approval_effect: After approval, the promise file is written, reviewer and time are recorded, and the promise enters accepted state.
draft_title_value: The graph can show promise relationships
draft_purpose_value: Reduce the cost of understanding system behavior.
draft_given_value: The project has module and promise files.
draft_when_value: The user generates a visualization graph.
draft_then_value: The graph shows modules, promises, evidence, and their relationships.
review_block_given_body: The project has module files, promise files, and result files.
review_block_when_body: The user generates a promise graph.
review_block_then_body: The graph shows module-owned promises and promise-observed evidence.
runs_description: Centered on promises, not test files.
runs_unknown_reason: Reason: no displayable test result has been collected yet.
settings_description: This will configure daemon URL, project root, language, and graph generation policy.
settings_daemon_description: Pair this browser with the local daemon before reading live project data.
settings_daemon_pairing_started: Pairing started. Enter the code shown by the local daemon.
settings_no_filesystem: Harness Studio does not read or write the filesystem directly.
settings_daemon_boundary: Local permission actions are delegated to the Harness Daemon, such as approve, reject, generate, and test.
settings_language_description: Choose the interface language for Harness Studio.
settings_color_theme_description: Switch between Better Hub-style token sets.
settings_radius_description: Adjust the rounding scale used across controls and surfaces.
studio_evidence_empty: No tests are bound to this promise yet, so nothing proves it.
